name: Queen of Pawns
description_short: Queen of Pawns Tampa, Florida — Florida-based pawn shop chain operating 15 locations since 1995, offering instant cash loans against personal valuables,...
description_long: Queen of Pawns was founded on March 28, 1995, with its first location in Lake Worth, Florida, and has grown to operate 15 locations across Florida including Miami, West Palm Beach, Orlando, Tampa, and Port Saint Lucie. The company positions itself as a sustainable shopping and quick-cash alternative for consumers in South Florida and Central Florida markets. Queen of Pawns offers three primary services: instant cash pawn (short-term collateral loans), sell for cash (direct purchase of items), and retail shopping for pre-owned luxury goods and electronics. The company accepts a wide variety of items including jewelry, watches, designer goods, electronics, power tools, lawn equipment, musical instruments, vehicles, and collectibles. They emphasize transparent pricing with no hidden fees, no credit checks, and no storage fees on pawn transactions. Queen of Pawns distinguishes itself through competitive pawn rates, free layaway options (10% down, no credit check), an online transaction portal for managing pawn extensions and layaway payments, and a commitment to sustainable shopping practices. Their marketing emphasizes community roots (31-year tenure in Lake Worth) and seasonal promotions tied to consumer events like tax refund season. The company operates standard retail hours (9am-7pm Monday-Saturday, 10:30am-3:30pm Sunday with some location variations) and maintains headquarters in West Palm Beach. Queen of Pawns is best suited for consumers seeking immediate cash without credit checks or credit impact, those looking for discounted pre-owned luxury items and electronics, and individuals preferring collateral-based short-term lending over traditional loans. The primary limitation is geographic concentration in Florida with limited national presence despite their new online store launch.
pros: No credit checks required for pawn or sell transactions
No storage fees or hidden fees on pawn loans
Free layaway option with only 10% down payment required
Wide variety of accepted items (jewelry, tools, vehicles, electronics, collectibles)
Established 31-year track record since 1995 with 15 physical locations
Online transaction portal for managing pawn extensions and layaway payments
Pawn loans do not impact credit score or credit history
cons: Limited to Florida physical locations (15 stores) despite online expansion claims
Website does not disclose specific interest rates or pawn loan terms
No information provided about loan duration, renewal policies, or redemption deadlines
Does not specify maximum loan amounts or valuation methodology
Website lacks customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification of 'best pawn rates' claim
best_for: Consumers in Florida needing immediate cash without credit checks or impact
Individuals with luxury items, jewelry, or electronics to liquidate quickly
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 30-60% discounts on pre-owned tools and equipment
People with poor credit or credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
diagnosis: Queen of Pawns is best for Florida residents needing rapid access to cash without credit qualification or consumers seeking steep discounts on pre-owned luxury goods and tools. The main caveat is the lack of transparency regarding specific interest rates, loan terms, redemption deadlines, and maximum loan amounts—critical details for evaluating the actual cost and terms of pawn loans.
services: Sell for Cash (direct purchase of used items)
Shop and Save (retail sales of pre-owned merchandise)
Free Layaway (10% down, no credit check installment purchasing)
Online Store (nationwide shipping of curated inventory)
Gold and Jewelry Buying (specialized purchasing portal)
Pawn Extension Management (online portal for loan renewal)
Layaway Payment Management (online portal for installment tracking)
Item appraisals for jewelry, watches, diamonds, collectibles, electronics, tools, vehicles
Cash recycling service for unwanted personal items
